hero.title: Seamless Relocation, Elevated by AI.
hero.subtitle: Based in Kuwait, we are an independently owned & operated Destination Services Provider providing comprehensive, cost effective and user-centered relocation experiences.

services.title: Home Placement
services.description: Finding the right home is the most important part of the relocation process. Placing the Assignee and their family in the right property is critical to a successful move.

services.title: Corporate Housing
services.description: We provide a wide range of housing solutions for every occasion. We work closely with you to understand your requirements.

services.title: School Admission Support
services.description: Finding suitable schooling for children is a primary concern. Our team works with Assignees to inform them about different school structures and curricula.

services.title: Immigration Support
services.description: Immigration regulations are challenging. Through our knowledge of local laws, we simplify the process for your employees.

services.title: Settling In
services.description: Moving is only the beginning. We work with Assignees to get all essentials taken care of, so they can fully start their new lives.

team.name: Reem Taka
team.bio: Born into a diverse family, with an Iraqi father and German mother, I have always been a global citizen. I moved to Kuwait in 2007. Having worked in logistics prior to my move, I wanted to leverage my skills to help families relocate and start new lives.

team.name: Joy Hogg
team.bio: Having moved to Kuwait in the early Eighties, I have seen countless families make Kuwait their new home. I joined ETC Relocation Services in 2016, bringing more than twenty years of industry experience.

team.name: Bothaina Helmy
team.bio: Ever since leaving Egypt in 2013, I’ve been lucky to live in different and diverse countries. I’ve been in Kuwait for the last ten years and love helping newcomers make this amazing country their new home.

contact.address: Tunis Street, Building 15, Office 9, Hawally, Kuwait

testimonials.text: Reem and her team at ETC Relocation Services are a force of nature. Their attention to detail surpasses anyone I’ve met in this field. Having the ETC team on our side was an absolute must.
testimonials.author: Avnish Kana
testimonials.title: IT Manager at Angola LNG Marketing Ltd.
